title: Poraale Lyrics Annakodiyum Kodiveeranum Songs Lyrics,

Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Poraaley .. poraaley
ye enna vittu annakodithaan poraaley
poraaley .. poraaley..
ye kanna katti kaatula vittu poraaley

Ada onnumey puriyalaye
ulagamum theriyalaye
en kannellaam neerkudamaai
yedhum kaanavum udayalaye
idhudhaan en porappa
idhudhaan un poruppa
manasu yeriyudhamma
aerikkum sudu neruppa

poraaley.. poraaley ..
ye enna vittu annakodithaan poraaley

Mansaara mugam paarthom
manasukulla vedha vedhachom
annai poda mudiyaama
aayaiellaam thorandhu vachom

Indha kaadellaam medellaam
kaal thadatha padhichivachi
karattu vazhi iruttu vazhi
kandapadi thirinju vandhom

Oru raathiriyum thoongunadha
namakoru kadhaiyum illa
ada raapagala theriyavilla
namakadhu pudhsumilla

adhellaam palaya kadha
adha ne yen maranndha
azhaiyaa alayuraney
adiye yen parandha

Ponaalum pogaliye
en nenpilum neethaan
nizhalilum neethaan maaralaye
oh .oh ....

Oru nodiyum oru pozhudhum
un nenapa olichadhilla
oru yugamaa palayugamaa
urava aththu thavichadhilla

Idhil yaaroda kannu pattu
prinjadhu namma pazhi
idhu vidhiyoda vizhayaatil
vidindhadhu periya pazhi

Yen vedhanaya eduthu sonnaa
mayilum azhugumadi
andha saami idha kettu sonna
unnakum priyumadi

Usurum nadungudhaiyaa
unna nenachapadi
iva un annakodi
poraa vera vazhi

poraaley .. poraaley
ye enna vittu annakodithaan poraaley

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Poraale?

The song Poraale conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of life.

What is the plot context of the movie Annakodiyum Kodiveeranum?

The movie Annakodiyum Kodiveeranum revolves around themes of love and adventure, with the song highlighting moments of happiness.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Manasi MM and SPB Charan.

Who composed the music for Poraale?

The music for Poraale was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was the song released?

The song was released on February 9, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Poraale, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the joyous moments of life, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. Set against the backdrop of Annakodiyum Kodiveeranum, it reflects the carefree spirit of the characters as they embrace happiness. The collaboration between Manasi MM and SPB Charan brings a delightful charm, while GV Prakash Kumar's composition adds a lively touch. This song evokes feelings of joy and togetherness, making it a favorite for festive occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poraale from the movie Annakodiyum Kodiveeranum is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, featuring the dynamic vocals of Manasi MM and SPB Charan. The infectious energy of the song, combined with GV Prakash Kumar's catchy composition, makes it a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their spirits. Dive into this musical treat that perfectly captures the essence of celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Go away... go away, what have I lost, it's just gone away, go away, go away... go away, why are you looking at me with those eyes?
I don't understand anything, the world is unclear, my eyes are filled with tears, I can't see anything, this is my burden, this is your responsibility, my heart is burning like a fire.
Go away... go away, what have I lost, it's just gone away, go away.
We looked at the face of the moon, our hearts are filled with confusion, we can't let go of our mother, we have gathered everything.
All these paths are like a maze, we have walked through the darkness and found our way back.
We don't have a story to tell for a night, we don't know the mornings, we have nothing new.
All these are old stories, why do you forget them, my dear, you are my birthright.
Even if you leave, you are still in my thoughts, you are in my shadow, oh... oh...
At every moment, at every second, your thoughts don't fade away, whether it's an era or many eras, our bond doesn't break.
Whose eyes are watching in this, this is our fault, this is a big mistake in our destiny.
If I express my pain, even the peacock will cry, if that God hears this, he will also feel sad.
Are you feeling uneasy? If you think of me, this is your way to go.
Go away... go away, what have I lost, it's just gone away, go away.
I don't understand anything, the world is unclear, my eyes are filled with tears, I can't see anything, this is my burden, this is your responsibility, my heart is burning like a fire.
